description: Represents a completed or in-progress DynamoDB table export to S3.

ExportArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the export.
ExportArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the export.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 37  
Maximum Length: 1024  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

TableName.description: The name of the table that was exported.
TableName.markdownDescription:
The name of the table that was exported.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ExportId.description: The unique identifier of the export.
ExportId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier of the export.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ExportStatus.description: Export can be in one of the following states: IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, or FAILED.
ExportStatus.markdownDescription:
Export can be in one of the following states: IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, or FAILED.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: IN_PROGRESS | COMPLETED | FAILED  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

TableArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the table that was exported.
TableArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the table that was exported.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 1024  
Update requires: Replacement

TableId.description: Unique ID of the table that was exported.
TableId.markdownDescription:
Unique ID of the table that was exported.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ExportTime.description: Point in time from which table data was exported, in ISO 8601 format.
ExportTime.markdownDescription:
Point in time from which table data was exported, in ISO 8601 format.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

S3Bucket.description: The name of the Amazon S3 bucket containing the export.
S3Bucket.markdownDescription:
The name of the Amazon S3 bucket containing the export.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 255  
Pattern: ^[a-z0-9A-Z]+[\.\-\w]*[a-z0-9A-Z]+$  
Update requires: Replacement

S3BucketOwner.description: The ID of the Amazon Web Services account that owns the bucket containing the export.
S3BucketOwner.markdownDescription:
The ID of the Amazon Web Services account that owns the bucket containing the export.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[0-9]{12}$  
Update requires: Replacement

S3Prefix.description: The Amazon S3 bucket prefix used as the file name and path of the exported snapshot.
S3Prefix.markdownDescription:
The Amazon S3 bucket prefix used as the file name and path of the exported snapshot.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 1024  
Update requires: Replacement

S3SseAlgorithm.description: Type of encryption used on the bucket where export data is stored.
S3SseAlgorithm.markdownDescription:
Type of encryption used on the bucket where export data is stored.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: AES256 | KMS  
Update requires: Replacement

ExportFormat.description: The format of the exported data.
ExportFormat.markdownDescription:
The format of the exported data.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: DYNAMODB_JSON | ION  
Update requires: Replacement

ExportType.description: The type of export that was performed.
ExportType.markdownDescription:
The type of export that was performed.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: FULL_EXPORT | INCREMENTAL_EXPORT  
Update requires: Replacement

StartTime.description: The time at which the export task began, in ISO 8601 format.
StartTime.markdownDescription:
The time at which the export task began, in ISO 8601 format.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

EndTime.description: The time at which the export task completed, in ISO 8601 format.
EndTime.markdownDescription:
The time at which the export task completed, in ISO 8601 format.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ExportManifest.description: The name of the manifest file for the export task.
ExportManifest.markdownDescription:
The name of the manifest file for the export task.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

BilledSizeBytes.description: The billable size of the table export.
BilledSizeBytes.markdownDescription:
The billable size of the table export.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ItemCount.markdownDescription:
The number of items exported.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
